rule.name: The maximum limit of registry keys monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.
rule.description: The maximum limit of registry keys monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.
rule.query:
<if_sid>230</if_sid>
    <field name="alert_type">full</field>
    <field name="fim_db_table">registry_key</field>
    <description>The maximum limit of registry keys monitored has been reached. At this moment there are $(keys_count) registry values and the limit is $(registry_limit). From this moment some events can be lost. You can modify this setting in the centralized configuration or locally in the agent.</description>
    <group>syscheck,fim_db_state,gdpr_IV_35.7.d,</group>
